honesty: real-build items are genuine engineering targets that require code + a passing test before they flip (no fabrication). in-progress-claim items are surfaced from the matrix and are mostly aspirational board claims.

completedRealBuilds.title: Wire runtime-mission propose → runtime-governance enforce
completedRealBuilds.detail: runtime-governance now exists (enforce/audit/rollback). Connect mission's proposals to real enforcement decisions + test.

completedRealBuilds.title: Persistence tier for the 6 runtimes
completedRealBuilds.detail: Back KG/mission/registry/validation/observability/governance with SQLite (node:sqlite) so state survives restarts; add persistence tests.

completedRealBuilds.title: Wire runtime-observability.collect into the gate
completedRealBuilds.detail: Have the governed-production-gate read live runtime health via observability.collect for a real topology snapshot.

completedRealBuilds.title: runtime-transport facade
completedRealBuilds.detail: A real deterministic transport contract between runtimes (currently no transport universe runtime).

completedRealBuilds.title: lipi-agent wrapper
completedRealBuilds.detail: Honest agent wrapper over lipi-runtime (transliteration/lineage) — flips a-knowledge-lipi-agent-wrapper.

queue.title: Lipi Agent — revives languages & scripts (NLP/OCR/translation)
queue.detail: lipi-runtime (real package) provides transliteration/learning/lineage primitives. Agent wrapper does not exist.

queue.title: Research Agent — discovers/analyzes/validates knowledge
queue.detail: kbs-runtime/src/{claims,review,moderation,governance,provenance} provides research-adjacent primitives. No autonomous Research Agent wrapper.

queue.title: AI Capabilities: Understand (NLU) / Reason & Infer / Generate & Create / Perceive & Interpret / Plan & Decide / Remember & Learn / Act & Automate / Collaborate
queue.detail: kbs-runtime/src/{search,claims,reasoning} provides Understand+Reason substrate. visual-hkd-runtime provides Perceive+Interpret for vision boards. Generate/Plan/Act runtimes not present.

queue.title: Formats: 120+
queue.detail: 120+ file formats is generic count; the repo handles a small subset (HTML, MD, JSON, PNG, etc.). No format conversion runtime.

queue.title: Lipi Glyphs Library: 15,000+ glyphs across Brahmi/Kharoshthi/Devanagari/Siddham
queue.detail: lipi-runtime/src/characters provides script-character primitives. 15K specific glyph assets are not stored as a library.

queue.title: Powered By: LIPI Language & Script
queue.detail: lipi-runtime is real; civilizational integration is aspirational.

queue.title: Knowledge Graph Dashboard renders the live knowledge graph
queue.detail: kbs-graph + kbs-runtime/src/graph/* exist and could feed a dashboard. The dashboard itself is not built and not wired.

queue.title: Lipi Dashboard renders script learning progress and accuracy
queue.detail: lipi-runtime has learning + search + governance data; UI surface is not built.

queue.title: ERD: users / profiles / roles / permissions / projects / tasks / milestones / knowledge_nodes / knowledge_relations / knowledge_sources / documents / assets / events
queue.detail: lipi-runtime/prisma/schema.prisma contains a real subset (lipi-domain tables). The board's 13-table ERD is broader and not implemented.

queue.title: Values Embodied: 12
queue.detail: The 12 values (Yamas+Niyamas extended) are catalogued correctly; 'embodied' as a measured property is not defined.

queue.title: HKD (Human Knowledge Data) is the universal knowledge format powering the ecosystem
queue.detail: visual-hkd-runtime defines an HKD type system and pipeline. It is real but narrow: extraction from visual sources to knowledge-graph projections. It is not (yet) wired as the universal cross-ecosystem format.

queue.title: Knowledge Features (Knowledge Graph, Semantic Search, AI Reasoning, Source Attribution, Continuous Learning)
queue.detail: kbs-runtime/src/{graph,search,claims,provenance,ingestion} provide the underlying capabilities. 'Continuous Learning' as a runtime is aspirational.
